title: Eliminate manual data transfer
summaryBody: Connecting Active to FreeAgent will eliminate the manual data transfer process and empower you to achieve greater efficiency and accuracy.

detailBlocks.text: Active is the cloud-first workpapers and accounts platform that removes manual work and accelerates every stage of compliance and reporting. It integrates with core accounting systems to increase accuracy, standardise workflows and turn routine work into a competitive advantage.

Connecting Active to FreeAgent will eliminate the manual data transfer process and empower you to achieve greater efficiency and accuracy.

Automatically import trial balances and ledger data from FreeAgent into Active Workpapers, reducing errors and speeding up compliance workflows.

Pre-populated lead schedules and templates mean less manual entry and more time for high-value work.

Enable your team to work on accurate, up-to-date data across platforms without duplication.
